title: CT2.terminal.scope completed discharge record — Scope terminal — interface boundedness refuted
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for semantic CT2-v2 node CT2.terminal.scope. It fixes the runtime identity, presentation order, successful status, and exact contract evidence without converting the semantic ID back to a numbered obligation ID.

tacticId.description: Owning tactic discriminator for CT2.terminal.scope; it must be CT2.

nodeId.description: Stable semantic runtime identifier for Scope terminal — interface boundedness refuted.

nodeNumber.description: One-based presentation-order index for CT2.terminal.scope; it is not part of the semantic identity.

status.description: Required completion state for CT2.terminal.scope; scope_candidate records the typed bounded-interface obstruction for the global audit.

dischargedContracts.description: Exact contract families discharged at CT2.terminal.scope: A-Scope.

contains.description: Requires A-Scope, which records the bounded-interface refutation for scope audit.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract instances for CT2.terminal.scope; one A-Scope record is required for each declared family.

schema.description: Discriminator for the A-Scope evidence at CT2.terminal.scope; this instance records the bounded-interface refutation for scope audit.

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Supply the declared proof-carrying state, decision, certificate, or payload. Every outgoing edge is available only through its named typed constructor and evidence slots.
